title: New AEW World Champ Samoa Joe To Make First Title Defense At Dynamite Winter Is Coming
summary: Newly-crowned AEW World Champion Samoa Joe will make his first title defense at "AEW Dynamite: Winter Is Coming."

title: The Rizzler Wants To Meet RJ City In The Ring
summary: The Rizzler calls out RJ City for a wrestling match. The Rizzler has been a part of AEW programming since last year, where he along with The Costco Guys would become part of AEW as Big Boom AJ...
